title: Grit Studio Run Public Contract Closed
forbids: missing closed public Run in Game status schema, open public status schema variants, or private diagnostics fields in public status projection
why: Packet 1 makes PublicRunStatus the only public Run in Game operation projection and keeps private diagnostics behind explicit lookup.
remediate: Keep public Run in Game status as a closed discriminated schema and expose private diagnostics only through runInGame.diagnostics({ diagnosticsId }).
message: Run in Game public contract reopened private diagnostics or open payload fields.
